# FilePilot

> Free, privacy-first, browser-based tools for PDF, image, and file conversion. All processing happens locally in the browser — no files are uploaded to any server.

Canonical site: https://www.filepilot.space/
Sitemap: https://www.filepilot.space/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://www.filepilot.space/robots.txt

## Main Pages

- [FilePilot - Free Private PDF, Image and File Tools](https://www.filepilot.space/): Free browser-based PDF, image, and file tools. Edit, convert, compress, organize, and optimize files privately without uploads.
- [Free Online PDF Tools - Private Browser-Based Tools | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-tools/): Merge, split, compress, convert, annotate, redact, sign, and organize PDFs with free tools that run privately in your browser.
- [Free Online Image Tools - Private Browser-Based Tools | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/image-tools/): Compress, resize, crop, convert, watermark, optimize, and edit images with free browser-based tools that do not upload your files.
- [Image Workflow Tools - Format, Validate and Prepare Images | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/image-workflows/): Prepare images for social media, ecommerce, passport photos, favicons, QR codes, and PDF workflows with private browser-based tools.
- [AI Image Tools - Private Browser-Based Editing | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/ai-tools/): Remove backgrounds, enhance images, upscale photos, and clean edits with AI-assisted tools that run in your browser where supported.
- [FilePilot Blog - Privacy, PDFs and Image Tools](https://www.filepilot.space/blog/): Articles about privacy-first file processing, browser-based PDF tools, image tools, and why files should stay on your device.
- [Support FilePilot | Keep private file tools free](https://www.filepilot.space/support/): Support FilePilot and help keep private, browser-based file tools free, ad-free and improving.
- [Privacy Policy | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/privacy/): Learn how FilePilot protects files with browser-based processing and no server uploads for supported tools.
- [Terms of Service | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/terms/): Read the terms for using FilePilot browser-based PDF, image, and file tools.
- [Why Your Files Should Never Leave Your Browser | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/blog/why-files-stay-in-browser/): Learn why browser-based file processing avoids server uploads, reduces privacy risks, and keeps sensitive documents under your control.
- [The Hidden Privacy Risks of Online PDF Tools | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/blog/privacy-risks-online-pdf-tools/): Understand the privacy risks of uploading PDFs to server-based tools and how local browser processing reduces exposure.
- [How FilePilot Keeps Your Documents Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/blog/how-filepilot-keeps-documents-private/): A practical look at FilePilot privacy architecture: browser memory, WebAssembly, Canvas APIs, and zero document uploads.

## PDF Organization Tools

- [Merge PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/merge/): Combine multiple PDF files into one organized document. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Split PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/split/): Extract pages or split documents into separate files. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Organize PDF Pages Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/organize-pdf/): Reorder, rotate, and delete pages with drag-and-drop thumbnails. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Rotate PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/rotate-pdf/): Rotate all or selected pages by 90°, 180°, or 270°. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Delete Pages Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/delete-pages/): Remove specific pages from your PDF file. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Extract Pages Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/extract-pages/): Pull out selected pages from a PDF into a new document. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Reverse PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/reverse-pdf/): Flip the page order of a PDF from last to first. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Add Blank Page Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/add-blank-page/): Insert blank pages at any position in your PDF. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Alternate Merge Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/alternate-merge/): Interleave pages from two PDFs alternately (ideal for double-sided scans). Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [N-Up PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/n-up-pdf/): Print 2, 4, or 9 pages per sheet to save paper. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Overlay PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/overlay-pdf/): Layer one PDF over another as an overlay or underlay. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Divide Pages Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/divide-pages/): Split each page in half horizontally or vertically. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Stitch Pages Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/combine-single-page/): Combine all pages into one long scrollable page. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Grid Combine Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/grid-combine/): Arrange multiple PDFs in a grid layout on a single page. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Posterize PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/posterize-pdf/): Tile a large PDF page across multiple sheets for poster printing. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Add Page Labels Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/add-page-labels/): Add custom labels (Roman numerals, prefixes) to PDF pages. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF Metadata Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-metadata/): Inspect PDF metadata: title, author, dates, page count. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF to ZIP Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-zip/): Bundle multiple PDF files into a single ZIP archive. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Compare PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/compare-pdf/): Compare page counts and text differences between two PDFs. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF Booklet Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-booklet/): Impose pages into a printable booklet (saddle-stitch) layout. Use this free PDF organization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## PDF Editing Tools

- [Fill Forms / Annotate Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/annotate-pdf/): Add text, highlights, checkmarks, and signatures to PDFs. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Watermark PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/watermark-pdf/): Add text or image watermarks to all or selected pages. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Redact PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/redact-pdf/): Permanently cover sensitive content in your PDF. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Sign PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/sign-pdf/): Draw, type, or upload a signature and embed it in your PDF. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Crop PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/crop-pdf/): Trim margins or set a custom crop area on PDF pages. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF Bookmarks Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/bookmark/): View, add, edit, or delete bookmarks in a PDF. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Table of Contents Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/table-of-contents/): Automatically generate a table of contents from PDF bookmarks. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Add Page Numbers Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/page-numbers/): Add customizable page numbers to any position on pages. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Header & Footer Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/header-footer/): Add custom text headers and footers to every page. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Background Color Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/background-color/): Add a solid background color to PDF pages. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Add Stamp Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/add-stamp/): Add "DRAFT", "CONFIDENTIAL", or custom text stamps to pages. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Remove Annotations Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/remove-annotations/): Strip all comments, highlights, and links from a PDF. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Form Filler Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/form-filler/): Fill in PDF form fields and flatten the result. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Form Creator Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/form-creator/): Build interactive PDF forms with text fields and checkboxes. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Remove Blank Pages Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/remove-blank-pages/): Automatically detect and remove blank pages from a PDF. Use this free PDF editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## Convert to PDF

- [Image to PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/images-to-pdf/): Convert JPG, PNG, WebP, SVG, BMP, HEIC, and TIFF images into one PDF document. Use this free PDF conversion tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [JPG to PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/jpg-to-pdf/): Convert JPG and JPEG photos into a PDF in your browser. Arrange images, choose page size, and download privately without uploads.
- [Text to PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/text-to-pdf/): Convert plain text files into formatted PDF documents. Use this free PDF conversion tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [JSON to PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/json-to-pdf/): Render JSON data as a formatted, syntax-highlighted PDF. Use this free PDF conversion tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Markdown to PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/markdown-to-pdf/): Convert Markdown documents to styled PDF files. Use this free PDF conversion tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## Convert from PDF

- [PDF to Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-images/): Export PDF pages as PNG, JPG, or WebP images with custom resolution. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF to JPG Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-jpg/): Convert PDF pages to JPG images locally in your browser with DPI and quality controls. Download pages as a private ZIP file.
- [PDF to SVG Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-svg/): Convert PDF pages to scalable SVG vector files. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF to Grayscale Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-greyscale/): Convert a color PDF to black-and-white grayscale. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF to JSON Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-json/): Extract PDF text and metadata as a structured JSON file. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF to Markdown Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-markdown/): Extract PDF content as a clean Markdown document. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Extract Text Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/extract-text/): Extract text from PDFs and images for TXT, Word, Sheets, and Slides workflows. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Extract Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/extract-images/): Extract all images embedded in a PDF as a ZIP file. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [PDF to CBZ Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-to-cbz/): Convert a PDF into a comic book CBZ archive. Use this free PDF export tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## PDF Optimization Tools

- [Compress PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/compress/): Reduce file size while maintaining quality. Use this free PDF optimization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Fix Page Size Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/fix-page-size/): Standardize all pages to A4, Letter, or custom dimensions. Use this free PDF optimization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Page Dimensions Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/page-dimensions/): Inspect the dimensions and orientation of every page. Use this free PDF optimization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Repair PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/repair-pdf/): Fix corrupted or damaged PDF files and recover content. Use this free PDF optimization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Deskew PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/deskew-pdf/): Automatically straighten skewed scanned document pages. Use this free PDF optimization tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## PDF Privacy & Security Tools

- [Protect / Unlock PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/pdf-security/): Unlock password-protected PDFs in your browser. Use this free PDF privacy tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Sanitize PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/sanitize-pdf/): Strip metadata, scripts, and hidden data from a PDF. Use this free PDF privacy tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Find & Redact Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/find-and-redact/): Search text patterns and permanently redact them from a PDF. Use this free PDF privacy tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Flatten PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/flatten-pdf/): Flatten forms and annotations into a non-editable PDF. Use this free PDF privacy tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## Image Editing Tools

- [Compress Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/compress-image/): Reduce image file size while preserving quality for JPG, PNG, and WebP. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Resize Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/resize-image/): Adjust image dimensions by pixels or percentage for any format. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Convert Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/convert-image/): Convert images between JPEG, PNG, WebP, and AVIF formats instantly. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Website Image Optimiser Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/website-image-optimiser/): Generate responsive, web-ready image variants with srcset and picture snippets. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Image Quality Analyzer Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/image-quality-analyzer/): Inspect image properties and get actionable quality recommendations. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Crop Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/crop-image/): Select and extract a rectangular area from JPG, PNG, or WebP images. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Rotate Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/rotate-image/): Rotate or flip images by any angle in your browser. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Watermark Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/watermark-image/): Add text or image watermarks to photos with adjustable transparency. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Metadata Remover Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/remove-image-metadata/): Inspect and remove EXIF, GPS, and camera metadata from images for privacy. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Blur Face Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/blur-face/): Blur faces, license plates, and sensitive areas in images. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Photo Editor Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/photo-editor/): Edit photos with filters, effects, text, frames, and stickers. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Image to SVG Converter Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/image-to-svg/): Convert simple logos, icons and illustrations into editable SVG vectors. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Color Picker Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/color-picker/): Pick colours from images and copy HEX, RGB, HSL and CSS values. Use this free image editing tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## AI Image Tools

- [Remove Background Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/remove-background/): Automatically detect and remove image backgrounds using AI, locally in your browser. Use this free AI image tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Change Background Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/change-background/): Replace image backgrounds with colours, gradients, blur, or custom images using AI. Use this free AI image tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Upscale Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/upscale-image/): Enlarge images using AI super-resolution to increase resolution while preserving detail. Use this free AI image tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [AI Enhance Image Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/ai-enhance-image/): Improve image quality with smart exposure, contrast, colour, and sharpness adjustments. Use this free AI image tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Object Remover Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/object-remover/): Paint over unwanted objects and remove them using content-aware inpainting. Use this free AI image tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.

## Image Workflow Tools

- [Image Formatter Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/image-formatter/): Resize, convert, compress, and batch-export images to exact dimensions and formats. Use this free image workflow tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Passport Photo Validator Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/passport-photo-validator/): Check passport and ID photo technical requirements with crop and export tools. Use this free image workflow tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Social Media Resizer Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/social-media-resizer/): Resize images for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, YouTube, and more in one step. Use this free image workflow tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [E-commerce Image Formatter Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/ecommerce-image-formatter/): Prepare product photos with clean backgrounds and marketplace-ready dimensions. Use this free image workflow tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Scan Image to PDF Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/scan-images-to-pdf/): Turn photos of documents into a clean, ordered, downloadable PDF. Use this free image workflow tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [Favicon Generator Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/favicon-generator/): Generate all website favicon and app icon assets from a single image. Use this free image workflow tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
- [QR Code Generator Online - Free and Private | FilePilot](https://www.filepilot.space/qr-generator/): Create custom QR codes for links, Wi-Fi, contact details and more. Use this free image workflow tool in your browser with local processing and no file uploads.
